code = r"""#!/usr/bin/env python3
import argparse, os, re, json, html as _html, datetime
from urllib.parse import urljoin
from assets.download_file import download_file
from assets.path_utils import resolve_local_asset, is_probably_local
from assets.css_rewrite import rewrite_css_recursive
from assets.compile_scss import compile_scss

def now_iso():
    return datetime.datetime.utcnow().isoformat(timespec="microseconds")+"Z"
def read_text(path):
    return open(path,"r",encoding="utf-8",errors="ignore").read()
def extract_head(html):
    m=re.search(r"<head[^>]*>([\\s\\S]*?)</head>", html, re.I); return m.group(1) if m else ""
def extract_body(html):
    m=re.search(r"<body[^>]*>([\\s\\S]*?)</body>", html, re.I); return m.group(1).strip() if m else ""
def pick_title(head_html):
    m=re.search(r"<title[^>]*>([\\s\\S]*?)</title>", head_html, re.I); return _html.unescape(m.group(1).strip()) if m else None
def pick_meta_content(head_html, name):
    m=re.search(rf'<meta[^>]+name=["\\\']{name}["\\\'][^>]*content=["\\\']([^"\\\']+)["\\\']', head_html, re.I)
    return _html.unescape(m.group(1)) if m else None
def pick_links_styles(head_html):
    return [m[0] for m in re.findall(r'<link[^>]+rel=["\\\']stylesheet["\\\'][^>]*href=["\\\']([^"\\\']+)["\\\']', head_html, re.I)]
def pick_images(body_html):
    return [m[0] for m in re.findall(r'<img[^>]+src=["\\\']([^"\\\']+)["\\\']', body_html, re.I)]
def pick_srcsets(body_html):
    sets=re.findall(r'<source[^>]+srcset=["\\\']([^"\\\']+)["\\\']', body_html, re.I); urls=[]
    for s in sets:
        parts=[p.strip().split(" ")[0] for p in s.split(",") if p.strip()]
        urls.extend(parts)
    return urls

def log_jsonl(path,obj):
    os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(path), exist_ok=True)
    with open(path,"a",encoding="utf-8") as f: f.write(json.dumps(obj,ensure_ascii=False)+"\n")

def main():
    ap=argparse.ArgumentParser()
    ap.add_argument("--html",required=True)
    ap.add_argument("--base",required=True)
    ap.add_argument("--slug",default="cloned_site")
    ap.add_argument("--verbose",action="store_true")
    a=ap.parse_args()

    reports="reports/clone_from_html.jsonl"
    log_jsonl(reports, {"ident":"clone_from_html","phase":"START","html":a.html,"base":a.base,"slug":a.slug,"ts":now_iso()})

    # sécurité : fichier présent ?
    if not os.path.isfile(a.html):
        log_jsonl(reports, {"ident":"clone_from_html","phase":"ERROR","error":"html_not_found","path":a.html,"ts":now_iso()})
        raise SystemExit(1)

    raw=read_text(a.html)
    head_html=extract_head(raw); body_html=extract_body(raw)
    title=pick_title(head_html) or "Sans titre"
    desc=pick_meta_content(head_html,"description") or ""
    canonical=pick_meta_content(head_html,"canonical") or a.base

    out_dir=os.path.join("projects", a.slug); os.makedirs(out_dir, exist_ok=True)

    # CSS collection & rewrite
    css_hrefs=pick_links_styles(head_html)
    css_local_dir=os.path.join(out_dir,"assets","css"); os.makedirs(css_local_dir, exist_ok=True)
    scss_root=os.path.join(out_dir,"scss"); os.makedirs(scss_root, exist_ok=True)
    scss_main=os.path.join(scss_root,"main.scss")
    scss_concat=[]; css_sources=[]; seen=set()

    for href in css_hrefs:
        entry={"href":href,"kind":None,"saved_as":None,"size":None}
        try:
            if is_probably_local(href):
                local_abs=resolve_local_asset(a.html, href); entry["kind"]="local"
                if local_abs and os.path.isfile(local_abs):
                    name=os.path.basename(local_abs); dst=os.path.join(css_local_dir,name)
                    with open(local_abs,"rb") as fi, open(dst,"wb") as fo: fo.write(fi.read())
                    entry["saved_as"]=dst; entry["size"]=os.path.getsize(dst)
                    css_raw=open(dst,"r",encoding="utf-8",errors="ignore").read()
                    rewritten=rewrite_css_recursive(css_raw, dst, out_dir, a.html, a.base, seen)
                    scss_concat.append("/* "+name+" */\n"+rewritten)
                else:
                    entry["error"]="local_not_found"
            else:
                entry["kind"]="remote"
                abs_url=urljoin(a.base, href)
                name=abs_url.split("?")[0].rstrip("/").split("/")[-1] or "style.css"
                dst=os.path.join(css_local_dir,name)
                download_file(abs_url, dst)
                entry["saved_as"]=dst; entry["size"]=os.path.getsize(dst)
                css_raw=open(dst,"r",encoding="utf-8",errors="ignore").read()
                rewritten=rewrite_css_recursive(css_raw, abs_url, out_dir, a.html, a.base, seen)
                scss_concat.append("/* "+name+" */\n"+rewritten)
        except Exception as e:
            entry["error"]=str(e)
        css_sources.append(entry)

    open(scss_main,"w",encoding="utf-8").write("\n\n".join(scss_concat) if scss_concat else "/* empty */")
    css_out=os.path.join(out_dir,"theme_owner.css")
    compile_info=compile_scss(scss_main, css_out)
    log_jsonl(reports, {"ident":"clone_from_html","phase":"CSS","sources":css_sources,"compiled":compile_info,"ts":now_iso()})

    # favicon
    fav = re.search(r'<link[^>]+rel=["\\\'](?:icon|shortcut icon)["\\\'][^>]*href=["\\\']([^"\\\']+)["\\\']', head_html, re.I)
    favicon={}
    if fav:
        href=fav.group(1)
        try:
            if is_probably_local(href):
                local_abs=resolve_local_asset(a.html, href)
                if local_abs and os.path.isfile(local_abs):
                    name=os.path.basename(local_abs)
                    dst=os.path.join(out_dir,"favicon.svg" if name.lower().endswith(".svg") else "favicon.ico")
                    with open(local_abs,"rb") as fi, open(dst,"wb") as fo: fo.write(fi.read())
                    favicon={"kind":"local","path":dst}
                else:
                    favicon={"kind":"local","error":"not_found"}
            else:
                abs_url=urljoin(a.base, href)
                dst=os.path.join(out_dir,"favicon.svg" if abs_url.lower().endswith(".svg") else "favicon.ico")
                download_file(abs_url, dst); favicon={"kind":"remote","path":dst}
        except Exception as e:
            favicon={"error":str(e), "href":href}
    log_jsonl(reports, {"ident":"clone_from_html","phase":"FAVICON","info":favicon,"ts":now_iso()})

    # images (ROBUSTE)
    failed_imgs=[]
    def copy_or_download(ref, bucket="img"):
        try:
            if is_probably_local(ref):
                local_abs=resolve_local_asset(a.html, ref)
                if local_abs and os.path.isfile(local_abs):
                    name=os.path.basename(local_abs)
                    rel=f"assets/{bucket}/{name}"
                    dst=os.path.join(out_dir, rel)
                    os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(dst), exist_ok=True)
                    with open(local_abs,"rb") as fi, open(dst,"wb") as fo: fo.write(fi.read())
                    return rel
                return ref
            abs_url=urljoin(a.base, ref)
            name=abs_url.split("?")[0].rstrip("/").split("/")[-1] or "asset"
            rel=f"assets/{bucket}/{name}"
            dst=os.path.join(out_dir, rel)
            download_file(abs_url, dst)
            return rel
        except Exception as e:
            failed_imgs.append({"ref":ref,"error":str(e)})
            return ref

    img_map=[]
    for src in set(pick_images(body_html)):
        new=copy_or_download(src,"img")
        if new!=src: body_html=body_html.replace(src,"./"+new)
        img_map.append({"from":src,"to":new})

    srcset_map=[]
    for s in set(pick_srcsets(body_html)):
        new=copy_or_download(s,"img")
        if new!=s: body_html=body_html.replace(s,"./"+new)
        srcset_map.append({"from":s,"to":new})

    log_jsonl(reports, {"ident":"clone_from_html","phase":"IMAGES","imgs":img_map,"srcsets":srcset_map,"failed":failed_imgs,"ts":now_iso()})

    # dict + manifest
    site_dict={
        "meta":{"slug":a.slug},
        "base_url":a.base,
        "site":{
            "lang":"fr",
            "head":{"title":{"FR": (title or "Sans titre")}, "description":{"FR":desc}, "canonical":canonical},
            "body":{"raw_html": body_html}
        },
        "assets":{"scss":{"entry":"main.scss","files":{"main.scss": open(os.path.join(out_dir,"scss","main.scss"),"r",encoding="utf-8").read()}}}
    }
    dict_path=os.path.join("samples", f"{a.slug}.json")
    os.makedirs("samples", exist_ok=True)
    open(dict_path,"w",encoding="utf-8").write(json.dumps(site_dict,ensure_ascii=False,indent=2))

    manifest={
        "slug":a.slug,"html_source":a.html,"base_url":a.base,"out_dir":out_dir,
        "css":{"entries":css_sources,"compiled":compile_info},
        "favicon":favicon,"images":img_map,"srcsets":srcset_map
    }
    open(os.path.join(out_dir,"clone_manifest.json"),"w",encoding="utf-8").write(json.dumps(manifest,ensure_ascii=False,indent=2))
    log_jsonl(reports, {"ident":"clone_from_html","phase":"END","ok":True,"out_dir":out_dir,"dict":dict_path,"ts":now_iso()})
    print(json.dumps({"ok":True,"dict":dict_path,"out_dir":out_dir}, ensure_ascii=False))

if __name__=="__main__":
    main()
"""
)
write("scraping/html_to_dict_instrumented.py", code)

# ---------- FIX 1 : assets/css_rewrite.py ----------
css_rewrite = r"""#!/usr/bin/env python3
import os, re
from urllib.parse import urljoin
from assets.download_file import download_file
from assets.path_utils import resolve_local_asset, is_probably_local

# Regex stables (parenthèses équilibrées)
URL_RX = re.compile(r"url\(([^)]+)\)")
IMPORT_RX = re.compile(
    r'@import\s+(?:url\(\s*([^)]+?)\s*\)|"([^"]+)"|\'([^\']+)\')',
    re.I
)

def _clean(u: str) -> str:
    return (u or "").strip().strip('"').strip("'")

def _bucket(name: str) -> str:
    n = (name or "").lower()
    if any(n.endswith(ext) for ext in [".png",".jpg",".jpeg",".gif",".webp",".svg",".avif"]):
        return "img"
    if any(n.endswith(ext) for ext in [".woff",".woff2",".ttf",".otf",".eot"]):
        return "font"
    return "file"

def _copy_or_download(origin_ref: str, out_dir: str, html_path: str, base_url: str):
    if is_probably_local(origin_ref):
        local_abs = resolve_local_asset(html_path, origin_ref)
        if local_abs and os.path.isfile(local_abs):
            name = os.path.basename(local_abs)
            b = _bucket(name)
            rel = f"assets/{b}/{name}"
            dst = os.path.join(out_dir, rel)
            os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(dst), exist_ok=True)
            with open(local_abs,"rb") as fi, open(dst,"wb") as fo:
                fo.write(fi.read())
            return rel
        return origin_ref
    abs_url = urljoin(base_url or "", origin_ref)
    name = abs_url.split("?")[0].rstrip("/").split("/")[-1] or "asset"
    b = _bucket(name)
    rel = f"assets/{b}/{name}"
    dst = os.path.join(out_dir, rel)
    download_file(abs_url, dst)
    return rel

def rewrite_css_recursive(css_text: str, css_origin: str, out_dir: str, html_path: str, base_url: str, seen: set):
    if css_origin in seen:
        return ""
    seen.add(css_origin)

    def to_abs(ref: str) -> str:
        ref = _clean(ref)
        if ref.startswith(("data:","http://","https://")):
            return ref
        if os.path.isfile(css_origin):
            return os.path.normpath(os.path.join(os.path.dirname(css_origin), ref))
        return urljoin(css_origin, ref)

    # Résoudre @import (url(...), "x.css", 'x.css')
    out_parts = []
    last = 0
    for m in IMPORT_RX.finditer(css_text or ""):
        out_parts.append((css_text or "")[last:m.start()])
        ref = m.group(1) or m.group(2) or m.group(3) or ""
        abs_ref = to_abs(ref)
        try:
            if abs_ref.startswith(("http://","https://")):
                from urllib.request import urlopen, Request
                rq = Request(abs_ref, headers={"User-Agent":"Mozilla/5.0 (clone_from_html)"})
                with urlopen(rq, timeout=30) as r:
                    imported = r.read().decode("utf-8","ignore")
                out_parts.append(rewrite_css_recursive(imported, abs_ref, out_dir, html_path, base_url, seen))
            else:
                if os.path.isfile(abs_ref):
                    imported = open(abs_ref,"r",encoding="utf-8",errors="ignore").read()
                    out_parts.append(rewrite_css_recursive(imported, abs_ref, out_dir, html_path, base_url, seen))
                else:
                    out_parts.append("")
        except Exception:
            out_parts.append("")
        last = m.end()
    out_parts.append((css_text or "")[last:])
    css = "".join(out_parts)

    # Réécrire url(...)
    rewritten = []
    last = 0
    for m in URL_RX.finditer(css):
        rewritten.append(css[last:m.start()])
        raw = _clean(m.group(1))
        if raw.startswith("data:"):
            rewritten.append(m.group(0))
        else:
            if os.path.isfile(css_origin) and not raw.startswith(("http://","https://")):
                abs_local = os.path.normpath(os.path.join(os.path.dirname(css_origin), raw))
                if os.path.isfile(abs_local):
                    name = os.path.basename(abs_local)
                    rel = f"assets/{_bucket(name)}/{name}"
                    dst = os.path.join(out_dir, rel)
                    os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(dst), exist_ok=True)
                    with open(abs_local,"rb") as fi, open(dst,"wb") as fo:
                        fo.write(fi.read())
                    rewritten.append(f"url({rel})")
                    last = m.end()
                    continue
            rel = _copy_or_download(raw, out_dir, html_path, base_url)
            rewritten.append(f"url({rel})")
        last = m.end()
    rewritten.append(css[last:])
    return "".join(rewritten)
"""
)

             "--html", a.html, "--base", a.base, "--slug", a.slug]
            + (["--verbose"] if a.verbose else []),
            check=True, capture_output=True, text=True
        )
    except subprocess.CalledProcessError as e:
        sys.stderr.write("---- extractor STDOUT ----\n" + (e.stdout or "") + "\n")
        sys.stderr.write("---- extractor STDERR ----\n" + (e.stderr or "") + "\n")
        raise

    lines = [l for l in (proc.stdout or "").splitlines() if l.strip()]
    out = json.loads(lines[-1])

    d = json.load(open(out["dict"], encoding="utf-8"))
    spec = {
        "site": d.get("site"),
        "out_dir": out["out_dir"],
        "base_url": d.get("base_url"),
        "css_file": os.path.join(out["out_dir"], "theme_owner.css")
    }
    from regenerate.execute_render_raw_html import execute_step
    res = execute_step(spec)
    print("[clone_from_html] ok =", res.get("ok"))
    if res.get("ok"):
        print("[clone_from_html] index:", res.get("index"))
        print("[clone_from_html] out_dir:", out["out_dir"])

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
"""))

print("✅ Patch appliqué : css_rewrite.py + run_clone_from_html.py")

identity (nom du site, favicon, couleurs de marque…),


view (template, thème, assets, mapping),


context (relations – ex : “ce site provient de telle source”),


definitions (champs : titres, textes, images) avec FR obligatoire,


rules (version, statut),


options.

Ce que je propose de faire (plan d’action, sans code pour l’instant)
Étape A — Extraction → “catalogue brut”


GET


Entrées : source.html, base_url, policy (ex : autoriser remote fetch, taille max asset…).




EXECUTE (Extractor)


HEAD : title, meta.description, link[rel=canonical], favicon (toutes variantes), lang.


BODY :


Sections logiques (heuristiques simples d’abord : section, main, header, footer, ou fallback par “blocs”).


Textes → normalisés en FR : {"FR": "..."} (si brut → transformer).


Images : img[src] + source[srcset] + inline CSS background-image:url(...).




ASSETS :


CSS : toutes les <link rel="stylesheet"> + @import ... → concat SCSS + réécriture url(...) vers assets/*.


Polices : URLs découvertes dans CSS (woff/woff2/ttf/otf) → stockées et référencées.




Écriture Catalogue (vecteurs) :


meta_site (ident du site, favicon, couleurs si détectables).


page_home (structure des sections, ordre, types).


assets_stylesheet (entrée SCSS + fragments).


assets_images (liste référencée par ident, pas de duplication).


assets_fonts.


mapping minimal (ex: “page_home.section[N].title → template.slot.title_N”).






VALIDATE


validate_any:


FR-only pour les textes (ta règle).


Schéma générique “meta_site / page / asset / mapping” dérivé du méta-schéma (MetaMetaclass).






RENDER (rapport extraction)


Un rapport JSON (écrit + log JSONL) avec :


sections_count, images_count, fonts_count, css_bytes, favicon_present, liste d’assets manquants/ignorés.






Logs JSONL (exemples d’items) :


extract.START {html, base_url}


extract.HEAD {title, has_favicon, metas_count}


extract.BODY {sections_count, texts_found}


extract.ASSETS {css_files, fonts, images_saved, failures:[…]}


extract.CATALOG_WRITTEN {vectors:[…]}


extract.END {ok:true}



Étape B — Mapping → “catalogue prêt pour template”


GET


Entrées : catalogues bruts (vecteurs) + template_id.




EXECUTE (Mapper)


Résout les slots du template depuis les vecteurs (zéro texte bidon).


Construit un “view manifest” (ex: head.links, head.meta, head.styles, body.sections[*].blocks[*]), 100% dérivé des vecteurs.




VALIDATE


Conformité du manifest au schéma du template (DRO : Definitions/Rules/Options du template).




RENDER (rapport mapping)


Log du coverage (combien de slots remplis / non remplis), alertes si un slot essentiel est vide.




Logs :


map.START {template, vectors_in}


map.SLOTS_FILLED {ratio, missing:[…]}


map.VIEW_MANIFEST_WRITTEN


map.END {ok:true}



Étape C — Pré-rendu → “HTML complet SEO”


GET


Entrées : view manifest, SCSS entry, assets.




EXECUTE (Prerender)


Compile SCSS → theme_owner.css.


Génére index.html avec HEAD riche (title, meta, canonical, favicon, styles inline ou link — SEO-friendly).


Option : inliner critical CSS (meilleur LCP/SEO).




VALIDATE


Vérifier : présence <title>, <meta name="description">, <link rel="icon">, liens stylesheet valides, ressources existantes.




RENDER (rapport prerender)


html_bytes, css_bytes, link_count, img_count, warnings.




Logs :


prerender.START


prerender.CRITICAL_CSS {inlined_bytes} (si activé)


prerender.HTML_WRITTEN {path}


prerender.END {ok:true}



Étape D — Diff & qualité (preuve que “c’est identique”)


GET


Entrées : HTML source (normalisé) vs HTML rendu (normalisé).




EXECUTE (Diff)


Diff structurel : histogramme de tags (h1/h2/p/img/…), arbre (profondeur moyenne), nb. sections.


Diff sémantique : longueur totale des textes, nb. images, titres comparés.


Diff style : nb. de règles CSS, familles de polices, palettes détectées (optionnel).




VALIDATE


Seuils : ex. text_ratio > 0.95, images_diff <= 2, etc.




RENDER (rapport diff)


Rapport JSON + console : OK / KO avec métriques (et liens vers “manquants”).




Logs :


diff.START


diff.RESULT {text_ratio, tags_hist, images_ok, images_missing:[…]}


diff.END {ok:true|false}



Étape E — Serveur & idempotence


GET


Entrées : out_dir, port.




EXECUTE (Serve)


Serveur local.




VALIDATE


Sanity : GET / retourne 200, assets servis (pas de 404 favicon/CSS).




RENDER


URL affichée, openable en 1 clic.




Logs :


serve.START {port}


serve.HEALTH {status:200}


serve.END {ok:true}



Points importants que j’intègre


Aucun contenu fictif : dès l’Étape B, les slots sont uniquement remplis par les vecteurs extraits.


FR obligatoire : tout texte brut est transformé en {"FR": "…"} à l’extraction, et re-validé avant mapping.

IVC×DRO : je range correctement qui va où (ex: favicon et nom → identity; template/theme → view; mapping relations → context.relations; champs textuels → definitions.fields; statut/version → rules, etc.).

def net_fetch(url, timeout=30):

w("helpers/url_tools.py", """#!/usr/bin/env python3
from urllib.parse import urljoin, urlparse, urlunparse
def abs_url(base, href):
    return urljoin(base, href)
def same_origin(a, b):
    pa, pb = urlparse(a), urlparse(b)
    return (pa.scheme, pa.netloc) == (pb.scheme, pb.netloc)
def to_rel(from_url, to_url):
    # simplifié: garde chemins absolus depuis la racine
    pf, pt = urlparse(from_url), urlparse(to_url)
    if (pf.scheme, pf.netloc)==(pt.scheme, pt.netloc):
        return pt.path if pt.path else "/"
    return to_url
def normalize_path(p):
    return p if p.startswith("/") else "/"+p
""")

w("helpers/html_pick.py", """#!/usr/bin/env python3
import re, html as _html
def pick_head(html): 
    m=re.search(r"<head[^>]*>([\\s\\S]*?)</head>", html, re.I)
    return m.group(1) if m else ""
def pick_body(html):
    m=re.search(r"<body[^>]*>([\\s\\S]*?)</body>", html, re.I)
    return m.group(1).strip() if m else ""
def pick_title(head_html):
    m=re.search(r"<title[^>]*>([\\s\\S]*?)</title>", head_html, re.I)
    return _html.unescape(m.group(1).strip()) if m else None
def pick_meta(head_html, name):
    m=re.search(rf'<meta[^>]+name=["\\\']{name}["\\\'][^>]*content=["\\\']([^"\\\']+)["\\\']', head_html, re.I)
    return _html.unescape(m.group(1)) if m else None
def pick_links(head_html):
    return re.findall(r'<a[^>]+href=["\\\']([^"\\\']+)["\\\']', head_html, re.I)
def pick_links_body(body_html):
    return re.findall(r'<a[^>]+href=["\\\']([^"\\\']+)["\\\']', body_html, re.I)
def pick_styles(head_html):
    return re.findall(r'<link[^>]+rel=["\\\']stylesheet["\\\'][^>]*href=["\\\']([^"\\\']+)["\\\']', head_html, re.I)
def pick_favicon(head_html):
    m=re.search(r'<link[^>]+rel=["\\\'](?:icon|shortcut icon)["\\\'][^>]*href=["\\\']([^"\\\']+)["\\\']', head_html, re.I)
    return m.group(1) if m else None
def pick_images(body_html):
    return re.findall(r'<img[^>]+src=["\\\']([^"\\\']+)["\\\']', body_html, re.I)
def pick_srcsets(body_html):
    out=[]
    for s in re.findall(r'<source[^>]+srcset=["\\\']([^"\\\']+)["\\\']', body_html, re.I):
        out += [p.strip().split(" ")[0] for p in s.split(",") if p.strip()]
    return out
def ensure_fr_text(t):
    return {"FR": t} if isinstance(t, str) else t
""")

w("helpers/file_ops.py", """#!/usr/bin/env python3
import os
def ensure_dir(p): os.makedirs(p, exist_ok=True); return p
def write_text(p, s):
    ensure_dir(os.path.dirname(p) or ".")
    with open(p,"w",encoding="utf-8") as f: f.write(s)
    return p
def write_bytes(p, b):
    ensure_dir(os.path.dirname(p) or ".")
    with open(p,"wb") as f: f.write(b)
    return p
""")

w("crawl/get_entry.py", """#!/usr/bin/env python3
def crawl_get(spec):
    start_url = (spec or {}).get("start_url")
    max_pages = int((spec or {}).get("max_pages", 50))
    max_depth = int((spec or {}).get("max_depth", 3))
    if not start_url: return {"ok": False, "error":"missing start_url"}
    return {"ok": True, "start_url": start_url, "max_pages": max_pages, "max_depth": max_depth}
""")

w("crawl/execute_walk.py", """#!/usr/bin/env python3
from collections import deque
from helpers.url_tools import abs_url, same_origin
from helpers.html_pick import pick_links, pick_links_body
def crawl_execute(get_out, fetch_html_fn):
    start = get_out["start_url"]; max_pages=get_out["max_pages"]; max_depth=get_out["max_depth"]
    seen=set([start]); q=deque([(start,0)]); pages=[]
    while q and len(pages)<max_pages:
        url, d = q.popleft()
        try:
            html = fetch_html_fn(url)
            pages.append({"url": url, "depth": d, "html": html})
            links = set(pick_links(html) + pick_links_body(html))
            for href in links:
                nxt = abs_url(url, href)
                if same_origin(start, nxt) and nxt not in seen and d+1<=max_depth:
                    seen.add(nxt); q.append((nxt, d+1))
        except Exception as e:
            pages.append({"url": url, "depth": d, "error": str(e)})
    return {"ok": True, "pages": pages}
""")

    diags=[]
    if not ok: diags.append({"severity":"error","message":{"FR":"Aucune page crawlée"}})
    return {"ok": ok, "diagnostics": diags}
""")

        "pages_count": len(exec_out.get("pages",[]))
    }, "pages": exec_out.get("pages",[])}
""")

    return {"ok": True, "page": page_obj}
""")

w("extract/execute_page.py", """#!/usr/bin/env python3
from helpers.html_pick import pick_head, pick_body, pick_title, pick_meta, pick_favicon, pick_images, pick_srcsets, ensure_fr_text
from helpers.url_tools import abs_url
def extract_execute(get_out, base_url):
    page = get_out["page"]; html = page["html"]; url = page["url"]
    head = pick_head(html); body = pick_body(html)
    title = ensure_fr_text(pick_title(head) or "")
    desc  = ensure_fr_text(pick_meta(head,"description") or "")
    fav   = pick_favicon(head)
    imgs  = list(set(pick_images(body) + pick_srcsets(body)))
    imgs_abs = [abs_url(url, s) for s in imgs]
    return {"ok": True, "url": url, "head": head, "body": body, "title": title, "description": desc,
            "favicon": abs_url(url, fav) if fav else None, "assets": {"images": imgs_abs}}
""")

w("catalogs/write_site_catalog.py", """#!/usr/bin/env python3
import os, json
from helpers.file_ops import write_text, ensure_dir
def write_site_catalog(site_root, start_url, pages_index):

import os, json
def map_execute(get_out):
    root = get_out["site_root"]
    pages=[]
    base_dir = os.path.join(root,"catalogs","pages")
    for dirpath, _, filenames in os.walk(base_dir):
        for fn in filenames:
            if fn=="page.json":
                j=json.load(open(os.path.join(dirpath,fn),encoding="utf-8"))

w("prerender/execute_site.py", """#!/usr/bin/env python3
import os, json
from helpers.file_ops import write_text, ensure_dir
from helpers.url_tools import normalize_path
def prerender_execute(get_out):
    root=get_out["site_root"]
    manifest=json.load(open(os.path.join(root,"manifests","view.json"),encoding="utf-8"))
    css_path=os.path.join(root,"theme_owner.css")
    # générer un fichier par page (structure de répertoires miroir)
    pages=[]
    for p in manifest.get("pages",[]):
        rel = normalize_path(p.get("rel") or "/")
        out_dir = os.path.join(root, "site", rel.lstrip("/"))
        ensure_dir(out_dir)
        head = p.get("head") or {}
        body = (p.get("body") or {}).get("raw_html") or ""
        title = (head.get("title") or {}).get("FR","")
        desc  = (head.get("description") or {}).get("FR","")
        fav   = head.get("favicon")
        html = f'''<!doctype html><html lang="fr"><head>
<meta charset="utf-8"/><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1"/>
<title>{title}</title>
<meta name="description" content="{desc}"/>
<link rel="stylesheet" href="{("/" + os.path.relpath(css_path, os.path.join(root,"site")).replace(os.sep,"/"))}"/>
{f'<link rel="icon" href="{fav}"/>' if fav else ''}
</head><body>{body}</body></html>'''
        idx = os.path.join(out_dir,"index.html")
        write_text(idx, html)
        pages.append(idx)
    return {"ok": True, "pages": pages}
""")

w("runner/run_clone_site.py", """#!/usr/bin/env python3
import os, json
from log.log_event import log_event
from helpers.net_fetch import net_fetch
from crawl.get_entry import crawl_get
from crawl.execute_walk import crawl_execute
from crawl.validate_walk import crawl_validate
from crawl.render_report import crawl_render
from extract.get_page import extract_get
from extract.execute_page import extract_execute
from extract.validate_page import extract_validate
from extract.render_page_catalogs import extract_render
from catalogs.write_site_catalog import write_site_catalog
from mapping.get_map import map_get
from mapping.execute_map import map_execute
from mapping.validate_map import map_validate
from mapping.render_manifest import map_render
from assets.save_images import save_images
from assets.save_favicon import save_favicon
from assets.collect_css import collect_css_from_pages
from prerender.get_site import prerender_get
from prerender.execute_site import prerender_execute
from prerender.validate_site import prerender_validate
from prerender.render_report import prerender_render

def run_clone_site(spec):
    # HOOK crawl
    from hooks.hook_before_crawl import hook_before_crawl
    from hooks.hook_after_crawl import hook_after_crawl
    from hooks.hook_onfailure_crawl import hook_onfailure_crawl
    # HOOK extract
    from hooks.hook_before_extract import hook_before_extract
    from hooks.hook_after_extract import hook_after_extract
    from hooks.hook_onfailure_extract import hook_onfailure_extract
    # HOOK map
    from hooks.hook_before_map import hook_before_map
    from hooks.hook_after_map import hook_after_map
    from hooks.hook_onfailure_map import hook_onfailure_map
    # HOOK prerender
    from hooks.hook_before_prerender import hook_before_prerender
    from hooks.hook_after_prerender import hook_after_prerender
    from hooks.hook_onfailure_prerender import hook_onfailure_prerender

    start_url = spec.get("start_url"); out_root = spec.get("out_root","projects/site_clone"); os.makedirs(out_root, exist_ok=True)

    # --- CRAWL ---
    try:
        hook_before_crawl({"spec":spec})
        g = crawl_get({"start_url": start_url, "max_pages": spec.get("max_pages",50), "max_depth": spec.get("max_depth",3)})
        if not g.get("ok"): raise RuntimeError(g.get("error"))
        e = crawl_execute(g, lambda u: net_fetch(u).decode("utf-8","ignore"))
        v = crawl_validate(e)
        r = crawl_render(v, e)
        log_event({"phase":"crawl","report": r.get("report"), "pages": len(e.get("pages",[]))})
        hook_after_crawl({"spec":spec})
    except Exception as ex:
        hook_onfailure_crawl({"spec":spec,"error":str(ex)})
        raise

    # --- EXTRACT (par page) ---
    pages_index=[]
    try:
        hook_before_extract({"count": len(e.get("pages",[]))})
        from helpers.url_tools import to_rel, normalize_path
        def mapper(u): 
            from urllib.parse import urlparse
            pu = urlparse(u)
            p = pu.path if pu.path else "/"
            return normalize_path(p)
        for pg in e.get("pages",[]):
            if not pg.get("html"): continue
            g2 = extract_get(pg)
            x  = extract_execute(g2, start_url)
            v2 = extract_validate(x)
            rr = extract_render(v2, x, out_root, mapper)
            pages_index.append({"rel": rr.get("page_rel")})
        write_site_catalog(out_root, start_url, pages_index)
        log_event({"phase":"extract","pages":len(pages_index)})
        hook_after_extract({"count": len(pages_index)})
    except Exception as ex:
        hook_onfailure_extract({"error": str(ex)})
        raise

    # --- MAP ---
    try:
        hook_before_map({"root":out_root})
        mg = map_get({"site_root": out_root})
        me = map_execute(mg)
        mv = map_validate(me)
        mr = map_render(mv, me, out_root)
        log_event({"phase":"map","pages": len((mr.get("manifest") or {}).get("pages",[]))})
        hook_after_map({"root":out_root})
    except Exception as ex:
        hook_onfailure_map({"error": str(ex)})
        raise

    # --- ASSETS ---
    mani = mr.get("manifest") or {}
    aimg = save_images(mani, start_url, out_root)
    afav = save_favicon(mani, out_root)
    acss = collect_css_from_pages(mani, out_root)
    log_event({"phase":"assets","images_saved": aimg.get("saved"), "images_failed": aimg.get("failed"), "favicon": afav, "css": acss})

    # --- PRERENDER ---
    try:
        hook_before_prerender({"root": out_root})
        pg = prerender_get({"site_root": out_root})
        pe = prerender_execute(pg)
        pv = prerender_validate(pe)
        pr = prerender_render(pv, pe)
        log_event({"phase":"prerender","report": pr.get("report")})
        hook_after_prerender({"root": out_root})
    except Exception as ex:
        hook_onfailure_prerender({"error": str(ex)})
        raise

    return {"ok": True, "out_root": out_root}
""")

SH

chmod +x install_site_clone_full.sh
bash install_site_clone_full.sh


Comment l’utiliser


Cloner toutes les pages (même origine), extraire, mapper, prérendre :


bashCopier le codebash bin/clone_site.sh \
  --start-url "http://localhost:8001" \
  --out projects/site_clone \
  --max-pages 100 \
  --max-depth 5



Servir le site reconstruit :


bashCopier le codebash bin/serve_cloned.sh projects/site_clone/site 8002
# Ouvre http://localhost:8002



Consulter les logs détaillés :


bashCopier le codetail -n 200 reports/site_clone.jsonl


Notes importantes


Navigation : les liens internes sont maintenus (même origine) et les pages sont créées en miroir (/chemin/vers/page/index.html) pour que la navigation fonctionne.


Contenu : le body HTML original de chaque page est utilisé (zéro texte bidon), normalisé dans les catalogues et re-injecté tel quel.


FR : les champs textuels head (title/description) sont forcés en {"FR": ...} à l’extraction.


CSS/SCSS : MVP = fichier theme_owner.css généré (concat placeholder). On peut ensuite brancher ta vraie chaîne SCSS (compilation) si tu veux la version avancée — l’architecture est prête (collect_css_from_pages.py à enrichir).


Images/Favicon : téléchargées et stockées sous projects/site_clone/assets/..., puis référencées.


Atomique : chaque fichier ne contient qu’une seule fonction.


Pipeline : toutes les étapes respectent GET → EXECUTE → VALIDATE → RENDER, avec hooks et logs JSONL.


Si tu veux qu’on passe en SCSS “réel” (résolution @import, url(...), fonts, critical CSS), je te patcherai collect_css_from_pages.py avec les extracteurs/réwriters que tu as demandés — la structure actuelle permet de remplacer la brique sans toucher au reste.

Merci pour les logs, ça m’a permis de cerner le souci :
on a bien crawlé 1 page, mais l’étape extract a traité 0 page. Ça signifie que dans la liste pages issue du crawl, l’entrée n’avait probablement pas de champ html (ou a été skippée silencieusement). Je te propose un patch unique qui :


Instrumente fortement le crawl et l’extract (logs par page, raisons des skips).


Rend l’extract tolérant : si html est manquant mais qu’on a une url, il re-fetch l’HTML à la volée.


Écrit un rapport détaillé (pages vues, pages extraites, erreurs).


Assure que au moins la page racine est extraite en catalogue puis prérendue.


Colle ce bloc tel quel à la racine de ___bygpt_supertools, puis exécute les 3 commandes à la fin.

#!/usr/bin/env python3
from collections import deque
from helpers.url_tools import abs_url, same_origin
from helpers.html_pick import pick_links, pick_links_body
from log.log_event import log_event

def crawl_execute(get_out, fetch_html_fn):
    start = get_out["start_url"]; max_pages=get_out["max_pages"]; max_depth=get_out["max_depth"]
    seen=set([start]); q=deque([(start,0)]); pages=[]
    while q and len(pages)<max_pages:
        url, d = q.popleft()
        try:
            html = fetch_html_fn(url)
            rec = {"url": url, "depth": d, "html": html}
            pages.append(rec)
            log_event({"phase":"crawl.page","url":url,"depth":d,"has_html": bool(html)})
            links = set(pick_links(html) + pick_links_body(html))
            for href in links:
                nxt = abs_url(url, href)
                if same_origin(start, nxt) and nxt not in seen and d+1<=max_depth:
                    seen.add(nxt); q.append((nxt, d+1))
        except Exception as e:
            pages.append({"url": url, "depth": d, "error": str(e)})
            log_event({"phase":"crawl.page","url":url,"depth":d,"error":str(e)})
    return {"ok": True, "pages": pages}
"""))

from helpers.url_tools import abs_url
from helpers.net_fetch import net_fetch
from log.log_event import log_event

def extract_execute(get_out, base_url):
    page = get_out["page"]; url = page["url"]
    html = page.get("html")
    if not html:
        # re-fetch tolérant

            html = net_fetch(url).decode("utf-8","ignore")
            log_event({"phase":"extract.refetch","url":url,"ok": True})
        except Exception as e:

           "favicon": abs_url(url, fav) if fav else None, "assets": {"images": imgs_abs}}
    log_event({"phase":"extract.page","url":url,"has_title":bool(title.get("FR")),"images":len(imgs_abs),"has_favicon": bool(fav)})
    return out

    from hooks.hook_onfailure_crawl import hook_onfailure_crawl
    from hooks.hook_before_extract import hook_before_extract
    from hooks.hook_after_extract import hook_after_extract
    from hooks.hook_onfailure_extract import hook_onfailure_extract
    from hooks.hook_before_map import hook_before_map

    try:

        if not g.get("ok"): raise RuntimeError(g.get("error"))

        v = crawl_validate(e)
        r = crawl_render(v, e)
        log_event({"phase":"crawl","report": r.get("report"), "pages": len(e.get("pages",[])),
                   "sample": (e.get("pages") or [None])[0] and {"url": e["pages"][0].get("url"), "has_html": bool(e["pages"][0].get("html")), "error": e["pages"][0].get("error")}})
        hook_after_crawl({"spec":spec})
    except Exception as ex:
        hook_onfailure_crawl({"spec":spec,"error":str(ex)})
        raise

    # --- EXTRACT (par page) ---
    pages_index=[]; attempted=0; extracted=0; skipped=[]
    try:
        hook_before_extract({"count": len(e.get("pages",[]))})
        from helpers.url_tools import normalize_path
        def mapper(u):
            from urllib.parse import urlparse
            pu = urlparse(u)
            p = pu.path if pu.path else "/"
            return normalize_path(p)
        for pg in e.get("pages",[]):
            url = pg.get("url")
            attempted += 1
            g2 = extract_get(pg)
            if not g2.get("ok"):
                skipped.append({"url": url, "reason": g2.get("error")})
                log_event({"phase":"extract.skip","url":url,"reason":g2.get("error")})
                continue
            x  = extract_execute(g2, start_url)
            if not x.get("ok"):
                skipped.append({"url": url, "reason": x.get("error"), "detail": x.get("reason")})
                log_event({"phase":"extract.fail","url":url,"error":x.get("error"),"detail":x.get("reason")})
                continue
            v2 = extract_validate(x)
            rr = extract_render(v2, x, out_root, mapper)
            pages_index.append({"rel": rr.get("page_rel")})
            extracted += 1
        write_site_catalog(out_root, start_url, pages_index)
        log_event({"phase":"extract","attempted": attempted, "extracted": extracted, "skipped": skipped})
        hook_after_extract({"count": extracted})
    except Exception as ex:
        hook_onfailure_extract({"error": str(ex)})
        raise

    # --- MAP ---
    try:
        hook_before_map({"root":out_root})
        mg = map_get({"site_root": out_root})
        me = map_execute(mg)
        mv = map_validate(me)
        mr = map_render(mv, me, out_root)
        log_event({"phase":"map","pages": len((mr.get("manifest") or {}).get("pages",[]))})
        hook_after_map({"root":out_root})
    except Exception as ex:
        hook_onfailure_map({"error": str(ex)})
        raise

    # --- ASSETS ---
    mani = mr.get("manifest") or {}
    aimg = save_images(mani, start_url, out_root)
    afav = save_favicon(mani, out_root)
    acss = collect_css_from_pages(mani, out_root)
    log_event({"phase":"assets","images_saved": aimg.get("saved"), "images_failed": aimg.get("failed"), "favicon": afav, "css": acss})

    # --- PRERENDER ---
    try:
        hook_before_prerender({"root": out_root})
        pg = prerender_get({"site_root": out_root})
        pe = prerender_execute(pg)
        pv = prerender_validate(pe)
        pr = prerender_render(pv, pe)
        log_event({"phase":"prerender","report": pr.get("report")})
        hook_after_prerender({"root": out_root})
    except Exception as ex:
        hook_onfailure_prerender({"error": str(ex)})
        raise

    return {"ok": True, "out_root": out_root}
"""))

from collections import deque
from helpers.url_tools import abs_url, same_origin
from helpers.html_pick import pick_links, pick_links_body
from log.log_event import log_event

def crawl_execute(get_out, fetch_html_fn):
    start = get_out["start_url"]; max_pages=get_out["max_pages"]; max_depth=get_out["max_depth"]
    seen=set([start]); q=deque([(start,0)]); pages=[]
    while q and len(pages)<max_pages:
        url, d = q.popleft()
        try:
            html = fetch_html_fn(url)
            rec = {"url": url, "depth": d, "html": html}
            pages.append(rec)
            log_event({"phase":"crawl.page","url":url,"depth":d,"has_html": bool(html)})
            links = set(pick_links(html) + pick_links_body(html))
            for href in links:
                nxt = abs_url(url, href)
                if same_origin(start, nxt) and nxt not in seen and d+1<=max_depth:
                    seen.add(nxt); q.append((nxt, d+1))
        except Exception as e:
            pages.append({"url": url, "depth": d, "error": str(e)})
            log_event({"phase":"crawl.page","url":url,"depth":d,"error":str(e)})
    return {"ok": True, "pages": pages}
"""))

from helpers.html_pick import pick_head, pick_body, pick_title, pick_meta, pick_favicon, pick_images, pick_srcsets, ensure_fr_text
from helpers.url_tools import abs_url
from helpers.net_fetch import net_fetch
from log.log_event import log_event

def extract_execute(get_out, base_url):
    page = get_out["page"]; url = page["url"]
    html = page.get("html")
    if not html:
        try:
            html = net_fetch(url).decode("utf-8","ignore")
            log_event({"phase":"extract.refetch","url":url,"ok": True})
        except Exception as e:
            log_event({"phase":"extract.refetch","url":url,"ok": False,"error":str(e)})
            return {"ok": False, "url": url, "error": "refetch_failed", "reason": str(e)}

    head = pick_head(html); body = pick_body(html)
    title = ensure_fr_text(pick_title(head) or "")
    desc  = ensure_fr_text(pick_meta(head,"description") or "")
    fav   = pick_favicon(head)
    imgs  = list(set(pick_images(body) + pick_srcsets(body)))
    imgs_abs = [abs_url(url, s) for s in imgs]
    out = {"ok": True, "url": url, "head": head, "body": body, "title": title, "description": desc,
           "favicon": abs_url(url, fav) if fav else None, "assets": {"images": imgs_abs}}
    log_event({"phase":"extract.page","url":url,"has_title":bool(title.get("FR")),"images":len(imgs_abs),"has_favicon": bool(fav)})
    return out
"""))

import argparse, os, sys
from importlib import import_module
from log.log_event import log_event

def main():
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser()
    parser.add_argument("--start-url", required=True)
    parser.add_argument("--out", required=True)
    parser.add_argument("--max-pages", type=int, default=50)
    parser.add_argument("--max-depth", type=int, default=3)
    parser.add_argument("--port", type=int, default=8000)
    args = parser.parse_args()

    log_event({"kind":"phase","stage":"clone_and_serve","status":"start","url":args.start_url})

    # 1. clone site
    clone = import_module("regenerate.clone_site").execute_step
    spec = {
        "start_url": args.start_url,
        "out_root": args.out,
        "max_pages": args.max_pages,
        "max_depth": args.max_depth
    }
    res = clone(spec)
    log_event({"kind":"phase","stage":"clone","status":res.get("ok"),"out":args.out})

    # 2. prerender
    prerender = import_module("regenerate.execute_render_raw_html").execute_step
    prer = prerender({"out_root": args.out})
    log_event({"kind":"phase","stage":"prerender","status":prer.get("ok")})

    # 3. serve
    serve = import_module("webserver.start_http_server").start_http_server
    site_root = os.path.join(args.out,"deploy")
    if not os.path.isdir(site_root):
        print("[clone_and_serve] Aucun dossier deploy trouvé, création…")
        os.makedirs(site_root, exist_ok=True)

    print(f"[clone_and_serve] prêt sur http://localhost:{args.port} (root={site_root})")
    serve(site_root, args.port)

if __name__=="__main__":
    main()

import argparse, os

def main():
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser()
    parser.add_argument("--start-url", required=True)
    parser.add_argument("--out", required=True)
    parser.add_argument("--max-pages", type=int, default=50)

if __name__ == "__main__":

#!/usr/bin/env python3
# description : GET — prépare le spec du scrape d’URL (start_url, bornes).
# howto : from crawl.scrape_urls_get import scrape_urls_get
def scrape_urls_get(vectors):
    spec = {
        "start_url": (vectors.get("spec") or {}).get("start_url"),
        "max_pages": int((vectors.get("spec") or {}).get("max_pages", 100)),
        "max_depth": int((vectors.get("spec") or {}).get("max_depth", 5)),
        "same_origin": True,
    }
    ok = bool(spec["start_url"])
    return {"ok": ok, "spec": spec, "diagnostics": ([] if ok else ["start_url manquant"])}
PY

bashCopier le codecat > crawl/scrape_urls_execute.py <<'PY'
#!/usr/bin/env python3
# description : EXECUTE — BFS pour collecter toutes les URLs internes (même origine).
# howto : from crawl.scrape_urls_execute import scrape_urls_execute
from urllib.parse import urlparse, urljoin, urldefrag
from urllib.request import Request, urlopen
from urllib.error import URLError, HTTPError
from html.parser import HTMLParser
from collections import deque
import socket

# une seule fonction dans ce fichier, helpers inlined pour respecter "1 fonction / fichier"
def scrape_urls_execute(get_out):
    spec = get_out["spec"]
    start = spec["start_url"]; max_pages = spec["max_pages"]; max_depth = spec["max_depth"]

    parsed_start = urlparse(start)
    origin = (parsed_start.scheme, parsed_start.netloc)

    class LinkParser(HTMLParser):
        def __init__(self): super().__init__(); self.links=[]
        def handle_starttag(self, tag, attrs):
            if tag.lower() == "a":
                href = dict(attrs).get("href")
                if href: self.links.append(href)

    def same_origin(u):
        pu = urlparse(u)
        return (pu.scheme, pu.netloc) == origin

    def fetch(url):
        # UA + timeout pour stabilité
        req = Request(url, headers={"User-Agent":"byGPT/ScraperURL/0.1"})
        with urlopen(req, timeout=10) as r:
            if "text/html" in (r.headers.get("Content-Type","")):
                return r.read().decode("utf-8", "ignore")
            return ""

    seen = set([start])
    q = deque([(start, 0)])
    pages = []
    all_urls = []

    while q and len(pages) < max_pages:
        url, depth = q.popleft()
        try:
            html = fetch(url)
        except (HTTPError, URLError, socket.timeout) as e:
            pages.append({"url": url, "depth": depth, "error": str(e)})
            continue

        pages.append({"url": url, "depth": depth, "error": None})

        # parse liens
        parser = LinkParser()
        parser.feed(html)
        for href in parser.links:
            # absolutise + enlève le fragment
            cand = urljoin(url, href)
            cand, _ = urldefrag(cand)
            # filtre schémas non http(s)
            p = urlparse(cand)
            if p.scheme not in ("http","https"): continue
            # filtre même origine
            if spec["same_origin"] and not same_origin(cand): continue
            if cand not in seen and depth + 1 <= max_depth:
                seen.add(cand)
                q.append((cand, depth+1))
                all_urls.append({"from": url, "to": cand, "depth": depth+1})

    # urls finales : l’ensemble vu (même le start)
    return {"ok": True, "pages": pages, "urls": sorted(seen)}
PY

#!/usr/bin/env python3
# description : VALIDATE — checks simples (>=1 page, start présent dans la liste).
# howto : from crawl.scrape_urls_validate import scrape_urls_validate
def scrape_urls_validate(exec_out, start_url):
    diags=[]
    urls = exec_out.get("urls") or []
    if not urls: diags.append("Aucune URL collectée")
    if urls and start_url not in urls: diags.append("start_url absent des résultats")
    ok = (len(diags)==0)
    return {"ok": ok, "diagnostics": diags}
PY

#!/usr/bin/env python3
# description : RENDER — écrit la liste d’URLs et un rapport léger.
# howto : from crawl.scrape_urls_render import scrape_urls_render
import os, json, datetime

def scrape_urls_render(val_out, exec_out, out_dir):
    os.makedirs(out_dir, exist_ok=True)
    urls_path = os.path.join(out_dir, "urls.json")
    with open(urls_path, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        json.dump({"urls": exec_out.get("urls", [])}, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)

    report = {
        "summary": {"FR":"Scrape d’URL terminé"},
        "count": len(exec_out.get("urls") or []),
        "written": urls_path,
        "timestamp": datetime.datetime.utcnow().isoformat()+"Z"
    }
    return {"ok": True, "report": report, "urls_path": urls_path}
PY

bashCopier le codecat > entrypoints/scrape_urls.py <<'PY'
#!/usr/bin/env python3
# description : Orchestrateur "scrape_urls" — GET → EXECUTE → VALIDATE → RENDER
# howto :
#   PYTHONPATH=$(pwd) python3 -m entrypoints.scrape_urls --start-url http://localhost:8001 --max-pages 100 --max-depth 5 --out projects/site_urls
import argparse, os, json
from importlib import import_module
from log.log_event import log_event

def main():
    p = argparse.ArgumentParser()
    p.add_argument("--start-url", required=True)
    p.add_argument("--max-pages", type=int, default=100)
    p.add_argument("--max-depth", type=int, default=5)
    p.add_argument("--out", required=True, help="Dossier de sortie (ex: projects/site_urls)")
    args = p.parse_args()

    vectors = {"spec": {"start_url": args.start_url, "max_pages": args.max_pages, "max_depth": args.max_depth}}

    before = import_module("hooks.hook_before_scrape_urls").hook_before_scrape_urls
    after  = import_module("hooks.hook_after_scrape_urls").hook_after_scrape_urls
    fail   = import_module("hooks.hook_onfailure_scrape_urls").hook_onfailure_scrape_urls

    get_fn = import_module("crawl.scrape_urls_get").scrape_urls_get
    exe_fn = import_module("crawl.scrape_urls_execute").scrape_urls_execute
    val_fn = import_module("crawl.scrape_urls_validate").scrape_urls_validate
    ren_fn = import_module("crawl.scrape_urls_render").scrape_urls_render

    try:
        before({"args": vars(args)})

        got = get_fn(vectors)
        log_event({"kind":"step","step":"GET","method":"scrape_urls","ok": got.get("ok"), "diagnostics": got.get("diagnostics")})
        if not got.get("ok"):
            raise RuntimeError("GET failed: " + "; ".join(got.get("diagnostics") or []))

        exe = exe_fn(got)
        log_event({"kind":"step","step":"EXECUTE","method":"scrape_urls","ok": exe.get("ok"), "pages": len(exe.get("pages") or []),"urls": len(exe.get("urls") or [])})

        val = val_fn(exe, got["spec"]["start_url"])
        log_event({"kind":"step","step":"VALIDATE","method":"scrape_urls","ok": val.get("ok"), "diagnostics": val.get("diagnostics")})

        ren = ren_fn(val, exe, args.out)
        log_event({"kind":"step","step":"RENDER","method":"scrape_urls","ok": ren.get("ok"), "written": ren.get("urls_path")})

        after({"report": ren.get("report")})
        print("[scrape_urls] ok =", True)
        print("[scrape_urls] report:", json.dumps(ren.get("report"), ensure_ascii=False))

    except Exception as e:
        fail({"error": str(e), "args": vars(args)})
        print("[scrape_urls] ok =", False)
        print("[scrape_urls] error:", str(e))

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
PY

Serveur (si demandé)

Tout est objet : les catalogues sont des vecteurs complets (site/page) portant identity / view / context / definitions / rules / options (IVC × DRO).


Localisation : tout texte → { "FR": "…" } par défaut (prêt pour i18n).


Zéro redondance : le catalogue site référence les pages par ident ; les pages référencent le site / favicon / styles ; les assets sont centralisés et pointés par chemin local.


Hooks & Logs : chaque méthode a hook_before_*, hook_after_*, hook_onfailure_* pour tracer et aucun log ne sort en dehors de ce pipeline.


1 fonction par fichier : GET, EXECUTE, VALIDATE, RENDER séparés ; chaque helper est une méthode dédiée de son objet (on reste fidèle à ta règle d’atomisation).


Fallback favicon Agence si absent au niveau projet.

#!/usr/bin/env python3
# description : Scrape (BFS) des URLs d'un site → écrit urls.json (respect GET→EXECUTE→VALIDATE→RENDER via étapes internes)
# howto : PYTHONPATH=$(pwd) python3 -m entrypoints.scrape_urls --start-url http://localhost:8001 --max-pages 100 --max-depth 5 --out projects/site_clone
import argparse, json, os, sys, socket
from collections import deque
from urllib.parse import urlparse, urljoin, urldefrag
from urllib.request import Request, urlopen
from urllib.error import URLError, HTTPError

# NOTE: 1 fichier = 1 fonction (main)
def main():
    p = argparse.ArgumentParser()
    p.add_argument("--start-url", required=True)
    p.add_argument("--max-pages", type=int, default=100)
    p.add_argument("--max-depth", type=int, default=5)
    p.add_argument("--out", required=True)
    args = p.parse_args()

    # --- GET (prépare le spec) ---
    start = args.start_url
    max_pages = max(1, args.max_pages)
    max_depth = max(0, args.max_depth)
    out_root = args.out
    os.makedirs(out_root, exist_ok=True)

    # --- EXECUTE (BFS) ---
    def _fetch_ok(u: str) -> bool:
        try:
            r = urlopen(Request(u, headers={"User-Agent":"byGPT/ScrapeURLs/0.1"}), timeout=10)
            ctype = (r.headers.get("Content-Type") or "").lower()
            # on veut des pages HTML (même si on ne lit pas le corps ici)
            ok = ("text/html" in ctype) or (ctype == "")
            try:
                r.close()
            except Exception:
                pass
            return ok
        except (HTTPError, URLError, socket.timeout):
            return False

    parsed = urlparse(start)
    base_netloc = parsed.netloc
    base_scheme = parsed.scheme

    q = deque([(start, 0)])
    seen = set()
    out_urls = []

    while q and len(out_urls) < max_pages:
        u, d = q.popleft()
        u, _frag = urldefrag(u)  # normalise: enlève #...
        if u in seen:
            continue
        seen.add(u)

        # domaine / schéma identiques
        pu = urlparse(u)
        if pu.netloc != base_netloc or pu.scheme != base_scheme:
            continue

        if _fetch_ok(u):
            out_urls.append(u)

            # découverte de nouveaux liens : on lit léger (pour trouver href=)
            try:
                with urlopen(Request(u, headers={"User-Agent":"byGPT/ScrapeURLs/0.1"}), timeout=10) as r:
                    html = r.read().decode("utf-8", "ignore")
            except Exception:
                html = ""

            if d < max_depth and html:
                # extraction hyper-simple d'hrefs
                # (pas de parser complet pour rester 1 fonction par fichier)
                import re
                for href in re.findall(r'href=["\']([^"\']+)["\']', html, re.I):
                    nu = urljoin(u, href)
                    nu, _ = urldefrag(nu)
                    if nu not in seen:
                        q.append((nu, d + 1))

    # --- VALIDATE ---
    ok = len(out_urls) > 0
    diagnostics = [] if ok else ["aucune page trouvée"]

    # --- RENDER (écrit urls.json) ---
    urls_path = os.path.join(out_root, "urls.json")
    with open(urls_path, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        json.dump({"start_url": start, "max_pages": max_pages, "max_depth": max_depth, "urls": out_urls}, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)

    # log console (les hooks système existent ailleurs)
    if ok:
        print("[scrape_urls] ok = True")
        print(f"[scrape_urls] urls: {len(out_urls)}  → {urls_path}")
    else:
        print("[scrape_urls] ok = False")
        print("[scrape_urls] error:", "; ".join(diagnostics))

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
PY

Tu clones actuellement http://localhost:8001, qui est notre petite page de démo quasi vide. Donc le clone… est vide.


Notre scraper actuel ne “voit” pas le contenu rendu par JavaScript. Si le site source injecte le contenu côté client (comme le fait ta démo via render_sections.js), un fetch HTML “brut” ne contient pas les blocs réels → il faut un prérendu (exécution JS côté crawler) pour capturer la page finale (SEO-friendly).


Il y a donc deux voies possibles, mais une seule répond à ton objectif “identique à l’original” :


(Rapide mais limité) Cloner un site SSR (sans JS critique).


(Recommandé) Activer un prérendu headless pour exécuter le JS puis sauvegarder l’HTML final, puis réécrire/rapatrier assets (CSS/JS/images) et reconstruire la navigation.

# ========== 2) Scrape des URLs (BFS) ==========
# 1 fichier = 1 fonction
cat > entrypoints/scrape_urls.py <<'PY'
#!/usr/bin/env python3
# description : Scrape (BFS) des URLs d'un site → out/urls.json
# howto : PYTHONPATH=$(pwd) python3 -m entrypoints.scrape_urls --start-url ... --max-pages 100 --max-depth 5 --out ...
import argparse, json, os, socket, re
from collections import deque
from urllib.parse import urlparse, urljoin, urldefrag
from urllib.request import Request, urlopen
from urllib.error import URLError, HTTPError

def main():
    p = argparse.ArgumentParser()
    p.add_argument("--start-url", required=True)
    p.add_argument("--max-pages", type=int, default=200)
    p.add_argument("--max-depth", type=int, default=5)
    p.add_argument("--out", required=True)
    args = p.parse_args()

    start=args.start_url; out_root=args.out
    max_pages=max(1,args.max_pages); max_depth=max(0,args.max_depth)
    os.makedirs(out_root,exist_ok=True)

    def _fetch(url):
        try:
            r=urlopen(Request(url,headers={"User-Agent":"byGPT/ScrapeURLs/0.1"}),timeout=12)
            html=r.read().decode("utf-8","ignore")
            ctype=(r.headers.get("Content-Type") or "").lower()
            r.close()
            return (html,ctype,200)
        except HTTPError as e:
            return ("", "", e.code)
        except (URLError, socket.timeout):
            return ("","",0)

    parsed=urlparse(start); base_netloc=parsed.netloc; base_scheme=parsed.scheme
    q=deque([(start,0)]); seen=set(); urls=[]
    while q and len(urls)<max_pages:
        u,d=q.popleft(); u,_=urldefrag(u)
        if u in seen: continue
        seen.add(u)
        pu=urlparse(u)
        if pu.netloc!=base_netloc or pu.scheme!=base_scheme: continue

        html,ctype,code=_fetch(u)
        if code==200 and ("text/html" in ctype or ctype==""):
            urls.append(u)
            if d<max_depth and html:
                for href in re.findall(r'href=["\']([^"\']+)["\']', html, re.I):
                    nu=urljoin(u,href); nu,_=urldefrag(nu)
                    if nu not in seen: q.append((nu,d+1))

    ok=len(urls)>0
    with open(os.path.join(out_root,"urls.json"),"w",encoding="utf-8") as f:
        json.dump({"start_url":start,"urls":urls},f,ensure_ascii=False,indent=2)
    print("[scrape_urls] ok =", ok)
    print("[scrape_urls] count =", len(urls))
PY
chmod +x entrypoints/scrape_urls.py

# ========== 3) Prérendu (Playwright) ==========
cat > entrypoints/prerender_urls.py <<'PY'
#!/usr/bin/env python3
# description : Prérend chaque URL (exécute JS) → out/prerender/<n>.html
# howto : PYTHONPATH=$(pwd) python3 -m entrypoints.prerender_urls --out ... --timeout 15000
import argparse, os, json, time
from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright

def main():
    ap=argparse.ArgumentParser()
    ap.add_argument("--out", required=True)
    ap.add_argument("--timeout", type=int, default=15000)
    args=ap.parse_args()
    urls_path=os.path.join(args.out,"urls.json")
    if not os.path.exists(urls_path):
        print("[prerender] ok = False"); print("[prerender] error: urls.json manquant"); return
    with open(urls_path,"r",encoding="utf-8") as f:
        urls=json.load(f).get("urls",[])
    pr_dir=os.path.join(args.out,"prerender"); os.makedirs(pr_dir,exist_ok=True)
    with sync_playwright() as p:
        browser=p.chromium.launch()
        page=browser.new_page()
        for i,u in enumerate(urls, start=1):
            try:
                page.goto(u, timeout=args.timeout, wait_until="networkidle")
                html=page.content()
                with open(os.path.join(pr_dir,f"{i:04d}.html"),"w",encoding="utf-8") as f:
                    f.write(html)
                print(f"[prerender] saved {i:04d}.html ← {u}")
            except Exception as e:
                print(f"[prerender] ERROR {u}: {e}")
        browser.close()
    print("[prerender] ok = True")
PY
chmod +x entrypoints/prerender_urls.py

# ========== 4) Récupération d’assets ==========
cat > assets/fetch_assets.py <<'PY'
#!/usr/bin/env python3
# description : Télécharge assets (img/css/js) référencés dans out/prerender/*.html → out/assets/...
# howto : PYTHONPATH=$(pwd) python3 -m assets.fetch_assets --out ... --base ...
import argparse, os, glob, re, urllib.request, urllib.parse

def main():
    ap=argparse.ArgumentParser()
    ap.add_argument("--out", required=True)
    ap.add_argument("--base", required=True)
    args=ap.parse_args()
    pr_dir=os.path.join(args.out,"prerender"); os.makedirs(pr_dir,exist_ok=True)
    assets_dir=os.path.join(args.out,"assets"); os.makedirs(assets_dir,exist_ok=True)
    imgs=set(); css=set(); js=set()
    for h in sorted(glob.glob(os.path.join(pr_dir,"*.html"))):
        with open(h,"r",encoding="utf-8") as f: html=f.read()
        imgs.update(re.findall(r'<img[^>]+src=["\']([^"\']+)["\']', html, re.I))
        css.update(re.findall(r'<link[^>]+rel=["\']stylesheet["\'][^>]+href=["\']([^"\']+)["\']', html, re.I))
        js.update(re.findall(r'<script[^>]+src=["\']([^"\']+)["\']', html, re.I))
    def _save(url, sub):
        url=urllib.parse.urljoin(args.base, url)
        try:
            p=urllib.parse.urlparse(url).path
            name=os.path.basename(p) or "index"
            od=os.path.join(assets_dir,sub); os.makedirs(od,exist_ok=True)
            dest=os.path.join(od,name)
            urllib.request.urlretrieve(url, dest)
            return dest
        except Exception:
            return None
    ok_i=sum(1 for u in imgs if _save(u,"img"))
    ok_c=sum(1 for u in css if _save(u,"css"))
    ok_j=sum(1 for u in js if _save(u,"js"))
    print(f"[assets] images={ok_i} css={ok_c} js={ok_j}")
    print("[assets] ok = True")
PY
chmod +x assets/fetch_assets.py

# ========== 5) Réécriture des liens (vers assets locaux) ==========
cat > assets/rewrite_links.py <<'PY'
#!/usr/bin/env python3
# description : Réécrit les href/src des HTML prérendus vers assets locaux → out/deploy/*.html
# howto : PYTHONPATH=$(pwd) python3 -m assets.rewrite_links --out ...
import argparse, os, glob, re, shutil

def main():
    ap=argparse.ArgumentParser()
    ap.add_argument("--out", required=True)
    args=ap.parse_args()
    pr_dir=os.path.join(args.out,"prerender")
    dep=os.path.join(args.out,"deploy"); os.makedirs(dep,exist_ok=True)
    for h in sorted(glob.glob(os.path.join(pr_dir,"*.html"))):
        with open(h,"r",encoding="utf-8") as f: html=f.read()
        html=re.sub(r'(<img[^>]+src=["\'])([^"\']+)(["\'])', r'\1./assets/img/\2\3', html)
        html=re.sub(r'(<link[^>]+rel=["\']stylesheet["\'][^>]+href=["\'])([^"\']+)(["\'])', r'\1./assets/css/\2\3', html)
        html=re.sub(r'(<script[^>]+src=["\'])([^"\']+)(["\'])', r'\1./assets/js/\2\3', html)
        # évite des ".." bizarres dans noms
        html=html.replace("./assets/img/https://","./assets/img/").replace("./assets/css/https://","./assets/css/").replace("./assets/js/https://","./assets/js/")
        name=os.path.basename(h)
        with open(os.path.join(dep,name),"w",encoding="utf-8") as f: f.write(html)
    # copie brute du dossier assets tel quel
    if os.path.isdir(os.path.join(args.out,"assets")):
        shutil.rmtree(os.path.join(dep,"assets"), ignore_errors=True)
        shutil.copytree(os.path.join(args.out,"assets"), os.path.join(dep,"assets"))
    print("[rewrite] ok = True")
PY
chmod +x assets/rewrite_links.py

[ -f webserver/start_http_server.py ] || cat > webserver/start_http_server.py <<'PY'
#!/usr/bin/env python3
# description : sert un dossier static
# howto : PYTHONPATH=$(pwd) python3 -m webserver.start_http_server --root <dir> --port 8000
import argparse, http.server, socketserver, os
def start_http_server(root, port):
    os.chdir(root)
    handler=http.server.SimpleHTTPRequestHandler
    with socketserver.TCPServer(("",port),handler) as httpd:
        print(f"[serve] http://localhost:{port}  (root={root})")
        httpd.serve_forever()
def main():
    ap=argparse.ArgumentParser()
    ap.add_argument("--root", required=True)
    ap.add_argument("--port", type=int, default=8000)
    a=ap.parse_args()
    start_http_server(a.root,a.port)
if __name__=="__main__": main()
PY

#!/usr/bin/env python3
# description : Clone complet depuis ident de catalogue → deploy + serveur
# howto : PYTHONPATH=$(pwd) python3 -m entrypoints.clone_from_catalog --site-ident myhealthprac --out projects/clone_myhealthprac --max-pages 150 --max-depth 5 --port 8020
import argparse, json, os, subprocess, sys, importlib

def main():
    ap=argparse.ArgumentParser()
    ap.add_argument("--site-ident", required=True)
    ap.add_argument("--out", required=True)
    ap.add_argument("--max-pages", type=int, default=200)
    ap.add_argument("--max-depth", type=int, default=5)
    ap.add_argument("--port", type=int, default=8020)
    args=ap.parse_args()

    with open("catalogs/sites_to_scrape.json","r",encoding="utf-8") as f:
        cat=json.load(f)
    site=cat.get(args.site_ident)
    if not site:
        print("[clone] ok = False"); print("[clone] error: ident introuvable dans le catalogue"); sys.exit(1)
    base=site["base_url"]; start=site["start_url"]
    os.makedirs(args.out, exist_ok=True)

    # 1) scrape URLs
    subprocess.check_call([sys.executable,"-m","entrypoints.scrape_urls","--start-url",start,"--max-pages",str(args.max_pages),"--max-depth",str(args.max_depth),"--out",args.out])
    # 2) prerender
    subprocess.check_call([sys.executable,"-m","entrypoints.prerender_urls","--out",args.out])
    # 3) assets
    subprocess.check_call([sys.executable,"-m","assets.fetch_assets","--out",args.out,"--base",base])
    # 4) rewrite & materialize
    subprocess.check_call([sys.executable,"-m","assets.rewrite_links","--out",args.out])

    # 5) serve
    dep=os.path.join(args.out,"deploy")
    import importlib
    serve=importlib.import_module("webserver.start_http_server").start_http_server
    print("[clone] ok = True")
    serve(dep, args.port)

if __name__=="__main__": main()
PY
chmod +x entrypoints/clone_from_catalog.py

#!/usr/bin/env python3
# description : Clone complet depuis un identifiant de catalogue (myhealthprac) et sert le site généré
# howto : PYTHONPATH=$(pwd) python3 -m entrypoints.clone_from_catalog --site-ident myhealthprac --out projects/clone_myhealthprac --max-pages 200 --max-depth 5 --port 8020
import argparse, json, os, subprocess, sys, importlib

def main():
    ap = argparse.ArgumentParser()
    ap.add_argument("--site-ident", required=True)
    ap.add_argument("--out", required=True)
    ap.add_argument("--max-pages", type=int, default=200)
    ap.add_argument("--max-depth", type=int, default=5)
    ap.add_argument("--port", type=int, default=8020)
    args = ap.parse_args()

    # Lire le catalogue
    with open("catalogs/sites_to_scrape.json","r",encoding="utf-8") as f:
        cat = json.load(f)
    site = cat.get(args.site_ident)
    if not site:
        print("[clone] ok = False"); print("[clone] error: ident introuvable dans catalogs/sites_to_scrape.json"); sys.exit(1)
    base = site["base_url"]; start = site["start_url"]
    os.makedirs(args.out, exist_ok=True)

    # Étapes : scrape → prerender → assets → rewrite
    subprocess.check_call([sys.executable,"-m","entrypoints.scrape_urls","--start-url",start,"--max-pages",str(args.max_pages),"--max-depth",str(args.max_depth),"--out",args.out])
    subprocess.check_call([sys.executable,"-m","entrypoints.prerender_urls","--out",args.out])
    subprocess.check_call([sys.executable,"-m","assets.fetch_assets","--out",args.out,"--base",base])
    subprocess.check_call([sys.executable,"-m","assets.rewrite_links","--out",args.out])

    # Serveur
    dep = os.path.join(args.out,"deploy")
    serve = importlib.import_module("webserver.start_http_server").start_http_server
    print("[clone] ok = True")
    serve(dep, args.port)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

#!/usr/bin/env python3
# description : Clone complet depuis un identifiant du catalogue (scrape→prerender→assets→rewrite→serve)
# howto : PYTHONPATH=$(pwd) python3 -m entrypoints.clone_from_catalog --site-ident myhealthprac --out projects/clone_myhealthprac --max-pages 200 --max-depth 5 --port 8020
import argparse, json, os, subprocess, sys, importlib

def _need(mod, hint):
    print(f"[clone] manquant: {mod}  ⇒ {hint}")
    sys.exit(1)

def main():
    ap = argparse.ArgumentParser()
    ap.add_argument("--site-ident", required=True)
    ap.add_argument("--out", required=True)
    ap.add_argument("--max-pages", type=int, default=200)
    ap.add_argument("--max-depth", type=int, default=5)
    ap.add_argument("--port", type=int, default=8020)
    args = ap.parse_args()

    # Lire le catalogue
    with open("catalogs/sites_to_scrape.json","r",encoding="utf-8") as f:
        cat = json.load(f)
    site = cat.get(args.site_ident)
    if not site:
        print("[clone] ok = False")
        print("[clone] error: ident introuvable dans catalogs/sites_to_scrape.json")
        sys.exit(1)
    base = site["base_url"]; start = site["start_url"]
    os.makedirs(args.out, exist_ok=True)

    # Vérifs modulaire (ne réécrit rien)
    try:
        importlib.import_module("entrypoints.scrape_urls")
    except ModuleNotFoundError:
        _need("entrypoints.scrape_urls", "crée-le (scrape URLs) avant de lancer.")
    try:
        importlib.import_module("entrypoints.prerender_urls")
    except ModuleNotFoundError:
        _need("entrypoints.prerender_urls", "installe Playwright et crée le prérender.")
    try:
        importlib.import_module("assets.fetch_assets")
    except ModuleNotFoundError:
        _need("assets.fetch_assets", "crée le fetch des assets.")
    try:
        importlib.import_module("assets.rewrite_links")
    except ModuleNotFoundError:
        _need("assets.rewrite_links", "crée la réécriture des liens.")
    try:
        importlib.import_module("webserver.start_http_server")
    except ModuleNotFoundError:
        _need("webserver.start_http_server", "crée un serveur static minimal.")

    # Étapes
    subprocess.check_call([sys.executable,"-m","entrypoints.scrape_urls",
                           "--start-url",start,"--max-pages",str(args.max_pages),
                           "--max-depth",str(args.max_depth),"--out",args.out])
    subprocess.check_call([sys.executable,"-m","entrypoints.prerender_urls","--out",args.out])
    subprocess.check_call([sys.executable,"-m","assets.fetch_assets","--out",args.out,"--base",base])
    subprocess.check_call([sys.executable,"-m","assets.rewrite_links","--out",args.out])

    # Serveur
    dep = os.path.join(args.out,"deploy")
    serve = importlib.import_module("webserver.start_http_server").start_http_server
    print("[clone] ok = True")
    serve(dep, args.port)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

    #!/usr/bin/env python3
    # description : Clone complet depuis un identifiant du catalogue (scrape→prerender→assets→rewrite→serve)
    # howto : PYTHONPATH=$(pwd) python3 -m entrypoints.clone_from_catalog --site-ident myhealthprac --out projects/clone_myhealthprac --max-pages 200 --max-depth 5 --port 8020
    import argparse, json, os, subprocess, sys, importlib

    def _need(mod, hint):
        print(f"[clone] ok = False")
        print(f"[clone] manquant: {mod}")
        print(f"[clone] hint   : {hint}")
        sys.exit(1)

    def main():
        ap = argparse.ArgumentParser()
        ap.add_argument("--site-ident", required=True)
        ap.add_argument("--out", required=True)
        ap.add_argument("--max-pages", type=int, default=200)
        ap.add_argument("--max-depth", type=int, default=5)
        ap.add_argument("--port", type=int, default=8020)
        args = ap.parse_args()

        # Lire le catalogue
        with open("catalogs/sites_to_scrape.json","r",encoding="utf-8") as f:
            cat = json.load(f)
        site = cat.get(args.site_ident)
        if not site:
            print("[clone] ok = False")
            print("[clone] error: ident introuvable dans catalogs/sites_to_scrape.json")
            sys.exit(1)
        base = site["base_url"]; start = site["start_url"]
        os.makedirs(args.out, exist_ok=True)

        # Vérifs modules (pour éviter un crash silencieux)
        try:
            importlib.import_module("entrypoints.scrape_urls")
        except ModuleNotFoundError:
            _need("entrypoints.scrape_urls", "crée/installe le scraper d'URLs (BFS).")
        try:
            importlib.import_module("entrypoints.prerender_urls")
        except ModuleNotFoundError:
            _need("entrypoints.prerender_urls", "installe Playwright et le module de prérendu.")
        try:
            importlib.import_module("assets.fetch_assets")
        except ModuleNotFoundError:
            _need("assets.fetch_assets", "crée le récupérateur d'assets (img/css/js).")
        try:
            importlib.import_module("assets.rewrite_links")
        except ModuleNotFoundError:
            _need("assets.rewrite_links", "crée la réécriture des liens vers assets locaux.")
        try:
            importlib.import_module("webserver.start_http_server")
        except ModuleNotFoundError:
            _need("webserver.start_http_server", "crée un serveur static minimal (start_http_server).")

        # Pipeline
        subprocess.check_call([sys.executable,"-m","entrypoints.scrape_urls",
                               "--start-url",start,"--max-pages",str(args.max_pages),
                               "--max-depth",str(args.max_depth),"--out",args.out])
        subprocess.check_call([sys.executable,"-m","entrypoints.prerender_urls","--out",args.out])
        subprocess.check_call([sys.executable,"-m","assets.fetch_assets","--out",args.out,"--base",base])
        subprocess.check_call([sys.executable,"-m","assets.rewrite_links","--out",args.out])

        # Serveur
        dep = os.path.join(args.out,"deploy")
        serve = importlib.import_module("webserver.start_http_server").start_http_server
        print("[clone] ok = True")
        serve(dep, args.port)

    if __name__ == "__main__":
        main()
""")

#!/usr/bin/env python3
# description : Prérend chaque URL (exécute JS) -> out/prerender/<n>.html
# howto : PYTHONPATH=$(pwd) python3 -m entrypoints.prerender_urls --out projects/clone_xxx --timeout 15000
import os, sys, textwrap, stat

code = textwrap.dedent("""\
    #!/usr/bin/env python3
    # description : Prérend chaque URL (exécute JS) → out/prerender/<n>.html
    # howto : PYTHONPATH=$(pwd) python3 -m entrypoints.prerender_urls --out projects/clone_xxx --timeout 15000
    import argparse, os, json
    from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright

    def main():
        ap = argparse.ArgumentParser()
        ap.add_argument("--out", required=True)
        ap.add_argument("--timeout", type=int, default=15000)
        args = ap.parse_args()

        urls_path = os.path.join(args.out, "urls.json")
        if not os.path.exists(urls_path):
            print("[prerender] ok = False")
            print("[prerender] error: urls.json manquant dans", urls_path)
            return

        with open(urls_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
            j = json.load(f)
        urls = j.get("urls", [])
        if not urls:
            print("[prerender] ok = False")
            print("[prerender] error: aucune URL à prérendre")
            return

        pr_dir = os.path.join(args.out, "prerender")
        os.makedirs(pr_dir, exist_ok=True)

        with sync_playwright() as p:
            browser = p.chromium.launch()
            page = browser.new_page()
            saved = 0
            for i, u in enumerate(urls, start=1):
                try:
                    page.goto(u, timeout=args.timeout, wait_until="networkidle")
                    html = page.content()
                    with open(os.path.join(pr_dir, f"{i:04d}.html"), "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
                        f.write(html)
                    saved += 1
                    print(f"[prerender] saved {i:04d}.html ← {u}")
                except Exception as e:
                    print(f"[prerender] ERROR {u}: {e}")
            browser.close()
        print(f"[prerender] ok = True (saved={saved}/{len(urls)})")

    if __name__ == "__main__":
        main()
""")

import os, stat, textwrap, json, datetime as dt
def w(p, s):

    if d: os.makedirs(d, exist_ok=True)
    with open(p,"w",encoding="utf-8") as f: f.write(s)
# init packages
